text: When the earth is shaken ˹in˺ its ultimate quaking,
and when the earth throws out ˹all˺ its contents, <sup foot_note=1324>1324</sup>

foot_notes.1324: lit., burdens (i.e., treasures and dead bodies).

text: and humanity cries, “What is wrong with it?”—
on that Day the earth will recount everything,
having been inspired by your Lord ˹to do so˺.
On that Day people will proceed in separate groups <sup foot_note=1325>1325</sup> to be shown ˹the consequences of˺ their deeds.

foot_notes.1325: The believers will head to Paradise and the disbelievers will head to Hell.

text: So whoever does an atom’s weight of good will see it.
And whoever does an atom’s weight of evil will see it.
